title: x402-conformance JSON report
description: Machine-readable output of `x402-conformance ... --json`. Versioned via reportVersion (semver-ish); consumers should pin a major.

reportVersion.description: Schema version of this report shape.

specBaseline.description: The pinned x402 spec snapshot all checks were written against.

target.description: Redacted endpoint origin; path, userinfo, query, and fragment are omitted.

targetFingerprint.description: Stable opaque fingerprint of the full target for run correlation.

conformant.description: True only for exit code 0 with sufficient mandatory evidence.

inconclusiveReason.description: Machine-readable reason an exit-2 verdict is inconclusive; null unless exitCode is 2. 'endpoint_absent': the tested endpoint does not exist or is the wrong kind. 'deferred_pending_upstream': a gating point was reported but deliberately not judged pending upstream. 'not_x402_v2': the mandatory version check did not pass. 'no_checks_applicable': nothing could be evaluated. 'unreachable'/'invalid_input': decided before checks ran.

reason_code.description: Optional machine-readable qualifier on one check's SKIP. 'deferred_pending_upstream': reported but deliberately not judged pending an upstream answer (a report containing one is never conformant). 'endpoint_absent': the endpoint this check tests does not exist (404/405/501) or is the wrong kind of endpoint.
